rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is entirely unrelated to Gov't Code §2306.036, which governs employment and removal of a board director with governor approval.
quote: With the approval of the governor, the board shall employ a director to serve at the pleasure of the board.
_note: No conflict. The rule_text addresses housing board director employment; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption amounts.
